prestazioni: Upgrade the 5.0L AM29 V12 (engine code: AM29/6) with a bespoke twin-turbo system using Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos, custom 4-inch titanium downpipes by Armytrix, and a Motec M150 ECU with a Lagonda-specific fuel map for 900+ HP on 98 RON fuel
Install a full titanium exhaust system by Capristo, featuring 3.5-inch piping, quad 100mm outlets, and a valved X-pipe with Akrapović Racing mufflers for optimal backpressure management

Replace the stock ZF 8HP90 transmission with a reinforced ZF 8HP95X with a custom torque converter by Spec Clutch, paired with a Pectel SQ6M transmission control unit for lightning-fast shifts and a Quaife ATB differential for improved power delivery
estetica: Apply a full Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit, modified specifically for the Lagonda’s proportions, with carbon fiber overfenders, aggressive front splitter, and a ducktail spoiler for aerodynamic balance

Install a custom interior by Sabelt, featuring carbon fiber Recaro Pole Position seats with 6-point harnesses, a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel with Alcantara grip, and a full digital dash by AIM MXS Strada for real-time telemetry

Fit a set of custom 22-inch forged BBS LM-R wheels in a staggered setup (9.5J front, 12J rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30 front, 325/25 rear) and a KW Clubsport 3-way coilover suspension with adjustable camber plates for track-ready handling
